summary.zh-CN: 本版本以稳定性和细节调整为主，未提炼出明确的新增产品功能。
summary.en: This version mainly focuses on stability and detail refinements rather than clear new product features.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

  • 本版本以稳定性和细节调整为主，未提炼出明确的新增产品功能。

问题修复

  • 修复了 Windows 环境下的 Codex 路径问题。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

  • This version mainly focuses on stability and detail refinements rather than clear new product features.

Fixes

  • Fixed a Codex path issue on Windows.
